ab: kudhaa twapalraku ki kaingu mumaci tusyubai, ku kaingu wailuku ku makalra ku ngilralredrekeini ka lacenge, lapiya twakanea ku kacalrilrisiyana ka lakanea bwai ki umase.
ch: 昨天我跟奶奶去市集擺攤，奶奶帶了許多自己種的蔬菜去，也製作了原住民美食給大家。
en: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

ab: madalame makanaelre ikay syubai ki kaingu, ku tavangulu si cemeameha takalra ku walangai, takalra ku umase ku wakela palalava ku tudamaiini.
ch: 大家很喜歡奶奶的攤位，辣椒和山當歸很多人買，許多人來品嘗她煮的菜餚。
en: Everyone loved my grandmother’s stall. Many people bought the chilis and Chinese Angelica, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

ab: ku againi ku mawngu si duhai malimeme tuhamuhu, laahakai ku bulabulai si makau cehebe ku beate, ku tasangusadha wathehepe pakainganai ku takalra ku badhabadha, wakela ikay syubainai siyugu makanaelre.
ch: 她煮的蕨菜和糯米飯非常好吃，還有用山豬肉煮的馬告滷肉，味道吸引了很多客人，大家都來我們攤位排隊。
en: The ferns and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.

ab: lu agaga kau kaingu, yathilaku dwaudaulu ku badhabadha, yathilaku walealeale, kay lalacenge ngilralredrekenai, kadruwa ku sababuu, nyama lrwabwala lwangai.
ch: 奶奶煮東西的時候，我在旁邊招攬客人。我在一旁大喊著：「蔬菜都是自己種的，天然有機，趕快來買喔!」
en: While my grandmother was cooking, I was on the side attracting customers. I shouted, “The vegetables are self-grown, all-natural and organic! Come and buy now!”

ab: ku kilangainai ku lamanema padalru si kalrepenge, kau kaingu amiyaikai, amanisa ikaisu palribulu lakuni.
ch: 我們的東西很快就賣完了，奶奶說：「都是因為有你的幫忙。」
en: Our goods sold out quickly, and my grandmother said, “It’s all thanks to your help.”

ab: kay takakadra kay, makalra ku kibulruli pathahukai ikay kacalrilrisiyana ka lawacebecebe si lakanea ka thingala, la kipabalra ku sakwalriyalri lu tusyubadha.
ch: 這個活動，我學到了有關原住民植物和食品的知識，並且體驗到了擺攤的辛苦。
en: Through this event, I learned about indigenous plants and food and experienced the hard work of running a stall.

ab: luceelaku ki kaingu ku hangehanganeini kay pathahwakai ki taleke ki kacalrisiya, ngyadradrahanaku si ikai ku lrigu.
ch: 看到了奶奶對傳統食物的熱愛，我感到非常驕傲和榮幸。
en: Seeing my grandmother’s passion for traditional food, I feel very proud and honored.
